case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. ERIC LAWRENCE LEIMSEIDER (SBN 69116)

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEIMSEIDER (SBN 69116), ERIC LAWRENCE $7,494.45 PRINCIPAL, $2,778.50 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, $294.00 CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,891.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
